## Summary

Soroban smart contract **`score-registry`** stores portable credit scores on Stellar. Oracle (ZCore backend) writes; any protocol reads via `get_score(wallet)`.

---

## Implementation (completed)

**Location:** `Contracts/score-registry/`

**Functions:**

| Function | Auth | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| `init(admin: Address)` | — | One-time setup; stores oracle admin |
| `set_score(wallet, score, tier)` | Oracle admin | Write score 0–850, tier 0–3 |
| `get_score(wallet)` | Public | Read attested record |
| `admin()` | Public | Return oracle address |

**Tier encoding:**

| Code | Tier |
|------|------|
| 0 | REJECTED |
| 1 | C |
| 2 | B |
| 3 | A |

**Storage:** `ScoreRecord { score, tier, updated_at }` per wallet (persistent).

**Tests:** Unit test `set_and_get_score` in `lib.rs`.

**Build:**
```bash
cd Contracts/score-registry
stellar contract build
```

---

## Server integration (code ready, deploy pending #16)

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `Server/src/services/soroban.service.ts` | `readOnChainScore`, `attestScoreOnChain` |
| `Server/src/controllers/contracts.controller.ts` | Config, on-chain read, attest |
| `Front/app/dashboard/attestation/page.tsx` | User-facing attestation UI |

**Env vars** (`Server/.env.example`):
```
SCORE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ID=C...
ORACLE_SECRET_KEY=S...
SOROBAN_RPC_URL=https://soroban-testnet.stellar.org
STELLAR_NETWORK=testnet
```
